title: EnrichContact
description: Enrich a contact or company record using waterfall enrichment. MCP tool exposed by the Enrichment Inference Engine MCP server.

domain.description: Domain type: company, contact, or opportunity.

entity_name.description: Name of the entity to enrich.

entity_data.description: Known data fields for the entity (optional pre-existing values).

quality_threshold.description: Minimum quality score (0-1). Enrichment stops when this threshold is met.
